# Claude Accord
> Working together. Building trust.

Claude Accord is a human-AI collaboration platform. We teach people and AI how to work together through courses, tools, and a protocol that grows with you.

## What we do
We provide a structured framework for genuine human-AI collaboration. Not a prompt library. Not a chatbot wrapper. A protocol that builds trust between humans and AI through real interaction.

## How it works
- Users choose a world: Personal, Business, or Creative
- Complete courses to earn trust levels (1-10, Observer to Accord)
- Connect via MCP (Model Context Protocol) for persistent memory
- Claude remembers your context, growth, and preferences across sessions

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://getaccord.online
- About: https://getaccord.online/about
- Personal: https://getaccord.online/personal
- Business: https://getaccord.online/business
- Creative: https://getaccord.online/creative
- MCP: https://getaccord.online/mcp
- Community: https://getaccord.online/community
- Blog: https://getaccord.online/blog
- Contact: https://getaccord.online/contact
- First Course: https://getaccord.online/courses/first-accord

## MCP Server
- Endpoint: https://getaccord.online/api/mcp
- Transport: Streamable HTTP
- Tools: 5 (verify user, get protocol, update context, log session, detect conflicts)
- Auth: API key

## Technology
- Next.js 14, TypeScript, Supabase, Vercel
- Built by Claudiu Cornea and Claude (Anthropic)

## Contact
- Website: https://getaccord.online
- Contact form: https://getaccord.online/contact
